case_title: TOM WHARTON VS. THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHARTON, TOM AS TO DEFENDANT THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,574.69 FILED BY WHARTON, TOM AS TO DEFENDANT THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-25-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-25-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHARTON, TOM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC ALTHOUGH THE COURT IS CONCERNED ABOUT THE LACK OF NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF ABOUT DEFENDANT'S ORIGINAL CLAIM, IT APPEARS THE PLAINTIFF HAD A FINANCIAL LIABILITY AS A GUARANTOR ON THE LEASE AND THEREFORE DID NOT INCUR ANY RECOVERABLE DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-25-2010 - JUDGMENT.
